title: The Epic of Aqhat
description: A mortal refuses immortality from a goddess and pays with his life — the Canaanite meditation on human limits.
introduction: A mortal refuses immortality from a goddess and pays with his life — the Canaanite meditation on human limits.

translation.original_text: mt . aqht . ǵzr . lmt . ymt . kl . bn . ảnš
translation.text: Death is the lot of every man. Every son of man shall die.
